value: Thanks for reaching out. I understand how frustrating it is when useful information gets removed from an app—that's valuable feedback. Unfortunately, I don't have details about the specific changes made in version 11.1 or the reasoning behind them. I'd recommend checking the App Store's release notes for that version, which often explain what's changed. If you have feedback about this feature removal, our product team would genuinely appreciate hearing it directly—please feel free to share those thoughts with us, and I can make sure it reaches the right people.
